name: mailpoppy
description: Host email for your own domains inside your own AWS account.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/api-client && npm run typecheck -w @mailpoppy/lambdas && npm run typecheck -w @mailpoppy/infra
scripts.test: npm run test -w @mailpoppy/core && npm run test -w @mailpoppy/desktop && npm run test -w @mailpoppy/desktop-sidecar
